rules: RULE-01: WAIT action -> turn += 1, energy += productionRate.
RULE-02: UPGRADE action -> if energy >= currentCost then { energy -= currentCost, levels[id] += 1, recalculate productionRate } else { log 'Insufficient energy' }.
RULE-05: Evaluate the win check at scenario start (BEFORE any action) AND immediately AFTER each action is applied: if energy >= 1000, set gameStatus = 'WON'.
RULE-06: Once gameStatus == 'WON', stop immediately — process no further actions from the scenario sequence; the current turn/energy are final.
RULE-07: An UPGRADE whose `id` is not present in the constants map causes NO state change and appends the log 'Invalid generator ID'.
